auth_confirmationEmail: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Check your inbox and click the link to verify your account.
auth_enterEmailDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it
auth_passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

auth_signInAndWellTakeYou: Sign in and we'll take you to the invitation.
auth_verifyEmailAndAccept: Verify your email and accept the invitation to join your team.
cta_subtitle: Create a free account and discover how Zynex CRM can help you grow your business.
dashboard_liveAnalytics: Live analytics of conversations, contacts, deals, broadcasts and automations.
errors_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
faq_item_0_a: We have a forever-free plan with 50 contacts and 1 member. We also offer 14-day trials of all paid plans.
faq_item_1_a: Yes, Zynex CRM works with Meta's official WhatsApp Business API. You just need your phone number ID and access token.
faq_item_1_q: Does it work with official WhatsApp?
faq_item_2_a: Yes, Basic, Pro and Enterprise plans include unlimited broadcasts with Meta-approved templates.
faq_item_3_a: We accept bank transfers. When you request a plan, we give you the details to make the payment and your account is activated manually.
faq_item_4_a: Yes, your data is stored securely with daily backups and encryption. You can export your information whenever you need.
faq_item_5_a: No, Zynex CRM is designed for anyone to use. The interface is intuitive and requires no technical knowledge.
faq_item_5_q: Do I need to know how to code?
features_card_0_desc: Your whole team works from the same inbox. Assign conversations, reply as a team and never miss a lead.
features_card_1_desc: Tags, custom fields, notes and automatic deduplication. Import contacts from CSV.
features_card_2_desc: Drag deals through stages. See what's won, what's falling through and where revenue is stuck.
features_card_3_desc: Send Meta-approved templates to segmented lists. Real-time tracking of delivery and reads.
features_card_4_desc: Welcome new contacts, automatic follow-ups, keyword routing. Visual flow builder.
features_card_5_desc: Generate responses with AI. Bring your own OpenAI or Anthropic API key. No additional cost per message.
features_subtitle: An all-in-one tool for your WhatsApp business. No need to combine multiple apps.
footer_powered: Built on WhatsApp Business API • Meta
hero_subtitle: Shared inbox, contacts, sales pipelines, broadcasts and automations. Everything you need to scale your WhatsApp business.
hero_title: Manage your WhatsApp business from one place
howItWorks_step_0_desc: Paste your phone number ID and access token from Meta. Works with any WhatsApp Business API provider.
howItWorks_step_1_desc: Import a CSV or let incoming messages build your list automatically.
howItWorks_step_2_desc: Use the shared inbox, set up flows for repetitive work and track what works.
howItWorks_subtitle: Most teams are up and running before finishing their first coffee.
inbox_whatsappNotConnected: WhatsApp® is not connected. Go to Settings to connect your account.
landing_footerTagline: WhatsApp Business CRM made for Latin American entrepreneurs and businesses.
payment_steps_3: Your account will be activated shortly
pricing_subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your business. All include technical support and updates.
subscription_trialDaysRemaining: days remaining in your trial period
why_item_0_desc: Your information stored securely. Daily backups and encryption.
why_item_1_desc: Support team available to help you with anything you need.
why_item_2_desc: Prices in Dominican pesos, official WhatsApp Business API integration.
why_item_3_desc: New features regularly based on user feedback.
why_testimonial: The best tool to manage WhatsApp for my business. Easy to use and the support is excellent.
terms_section_1_content: By accessing and using Zynex CRM, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to any of these terms, you should not use our service.
terms_section_2_content: Zynex CRM is a customer relationship management platform designed to facilitate WhatsApp Business communication. The service includes shared inbox, contact management, sales pipeline, broadcast campaigns, automations, and workflows.
terms_section_3_content: To use Zynex CRM, you must create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
terms_section_4_content: Zynex CRM offers free and paid plans. Paid plans are billed monthly. By subscribing to a paid plan, you authorize Zynex SRL to charge the corresponding amount to your payment method. Plans may include trial periods, after which regular billing will apply.
terms_section_5_content: You agree to use Zynex CRM lawfully and in accordance with these terms. The following is prohibited:
terms_prohibited_1: Using the service for any illegal or unauthorized purpose
terms_prohibited_2: Violating any law, regulation, or third-party rights
terms_prohibited_3: Sending spam, unsolicited messages, or malicious content
terms_prohibited_4: Attempting to access without authorization systems or data of other users
terms_prohibited_5: Using the service in a way that may damage, disable, or overload our servers
terms_section_6_content: Zynex CRM and all its content, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, and software, are property of Zynex SRL and are protected by Dominican Republic intellectual property laws and international treaties.
terms_section_7_content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Zynex SRL shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from the use or inability to use our service, including but not limited to damages for loss of profits, data, or other intangible losses.
terms_section_8_content: We may terminate your account and access to the service at any time, with or without cause, and with or without notice. Upon termination, your right to use the service will cease immediately. Account data may be deleted after 30 days of inactivity on free plans.
terms_section_9_content: These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of the Dominican Republic. Any dispute arising from these terms will be resolved exclusively by the competent courts of Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic.
terms_section_10_content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, you can contact us via WhatsApp at +1 (809) 675-7686 or by email at soporte@zynex.do.
privacy_section_1_content: At Zynex SRL (Nexus Computing Solutions SRL), we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, store, and protect your information when using Zynex CRM.
privacy_section_2_intro: We collect the following types of information:
privacy_personal_1: Full name and email when creating an account
privacy_personal_3: Your clients' contact data (names, phones, emails)
privacy_usage_1: Data on interaction with the service
privacy_usage_2: Device and connection information (IP address, browser type)
privacy_section_3_content: We use your data to: provide, maintain, and improve our service; process your transactions and manage your account; communicate with you about updates, support, and technical support; analyze usage patterns to optimize user experience; and comply with legal obligations.
privacy_section_4_content: Your data is stored on secure servers located in the Dominican Republic. We maintain daily backups of all data and use SSL/TLS encryption to protect information transmission. We will retain your data while your account is active or as necessary to provide you services.
privacy_section_5_intro: We do not sell your personal data. We share information only in the following circumstances:
privacy_sharing_1: With service providers who help us operate the service (hosting, technical support)
privacy_sharing_2: When required by law or in response to legal requests
privacy_sharing_3: To protect our rights, property, or safety, and those of our users
privacy_section_6_content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, destruction, or disclosure. This includes encryption, access controls, regular audits, and staff training.
privacy_rights_1: Access your personal data that we store
privacy_rights_3: Request deletion of your personal data
privacy_rights_4: Export your data in readable format
privacy_rights_5: Opt out of receiving marketing communications
privacy_section_8_content: Zynex CRM uses cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience. Cookies are small files stored on your device. You can configure your browser to reject all cookies or indicate when a cookie is being sent.
privacy_section_9_content: Our service may contain links to third-party services or integrate with external APIs (such as Meta's WhatsApp Business API). We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these third parties. We recommend reviewing the privacy policies of any third-party services you use.
privacy_section_10_content: Our service is not directed to individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you discover that a child has provided us with personal information, contact us to delete such information.
privacy_section_11_content: We may update this Privacy Policy occasionally. We will notify you of significant changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the 'Last updated' date. We recommend reviewing this policy periodically.
privacy_section_12_content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, you can contact us via WhatsApp at +1 (809) 675-7686, by email at privacidad@zynex.do, or by mail to Zynex SRL, Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic.
